_comment: Golden corpus for bench.py. Each fixture replays a WAV through the REAL live.py pipeline and scores it. 'ref' = reference transcript (relative to bakeoff/); 'terms' = file of IT terms expected in the output (recall). Add more fixtures here as we dogfood — record a clip, write its reference once, append an entry.

fixtures.name: script-read-2
fixtures.note: same script, take 2 with natural sentence pauses

fixtures.name: coding
fixtures.note: natural coding narration, terms sprinkled (refs recognizer-bootstrapped + spot-corrected)

fixtures.name: messy
fixtures.note: ordinary speech, NO tech terms — over-correction test (injected should stay 0)

fixtures.name: global-vocab
fixtures.note: G2 payoff fixture — sentences USING global-pack jargon (web socket->WebSocket, oh llama->Ollama...). Guards that the default-on pack keeps landing terms; controls (a llama, type a script) stay. Recall gated against the canonical terms file.
